name: Seven Fold Palace
text: Reaction: After an honored character you control wins a conflict as the attacker, bow this stronghold – gain 2 honor.

name: Foothills Keep
text:
Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.)
As an additional cost to attack another province you control, your opponent must spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring.

name: Honor's Reward
text: Action: During a conflict at a [fire] province, choose a participating character – that character gets +3 glory until the end of the conflict.

name: Pious Guardian
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, if you control 1 or fewer broken provinces – gain 1 honor.

name: Hida Etsuji
text:
This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword.
You can trigger each ability on a province you control an additional time each round (or specified period).

name: Master of the Court
text:
Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)
Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate, discard an honored status token from this character – cancel those effects.

name: Master of Many Lifetimes
text:
Seeker role only.
Rally.
Interrupt: When a character you control would leave play, choose a facedown province you control - put that character into that province instead, adding each attachment on it to its owner's hand.

name: Fearless Skirmisher
text:
Keeper role only.
Reaction: After this character wins a [mil] conflict, choose a dishonored status token and a character – move the status token to the chosen character.

name: Honored Veterans
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: Each player chooses up to one Bushi character they played this phase – honor each of those characters.

name: Asako Lawmaster
text: Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict – gain 1 honor.

name: Endless Archives
text: Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict – put an honor token on this holding. Then, put X cards from your hand on the bottom of your conflict deck and draw that many cards, where X is the number of honor tokens on this holding. Any player may trigger this ability. (Unlimited.)

name: Beautiful Entertainer
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Interrupt: When this character leaves play, if you are less honorable than an opponent – gain 2 honor.

name: Shinjo Altansarnai
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict in which this character is participating – search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a non-unique character with printed cost 3 or lower and put that character into play in the conflict. Shuffle.

name: Contested Countryside
text:
Keeper role only.
Rally.
During conflicts in which you are the attacking player, you may trigger the attacked province's abilities as if you controlled that province.

name: Ceaseless Duty
text: Action: When a character with printed cost equal to or lower than the number of unbroken provinces you control would leave play – it remains in play instead.

name: Elegance and Grace
text: Action: Choose up to two honored characters with total printed gold cost 6 or less – ready each of those characters.

name: Waterfall Tattoo
text:
Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait.
Reaction: After a province you control is revealed - ready attached character.

name: Divine Ancestry
text:
Earth role only.
Reaction: After a phase begins – you cannot lose honor this phase.

name: The Receding Tie
text:
Water role only.
Action: Choose a non-Mythic character you own – put that character into a non-stronghold province you control. (It is now out of play.)

name: Soshi Diviner
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a card in a non-stronghold province – move that card to another non-stronghold province controlled by the same player.

name: Stoke Insurrection
text:
Reduce the cost to play this card by 2 if your opponent has 4 or more facedown cards in their provinces.
Action: During a conflict, reveal each facedown card in your opponent's provinces. Then, choose up to 2 characters in their provinces – put those characters into play in the conflict under your control.

name: Command By Name
text:
Water role only.
Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor and discard a card from your hand – set the attacked province's base strength to 0 until the end of the conflict.
